title: Verify Admin User List View
objective: Validates that authenticated Admin users can view a list of all registered users, and that non-admins are denied access.

steps.step: Log in to the system as a user with 'Admin' privileges.
Navigate to the administrative dashboard or '/admin/users' page.
steps.expected_result: The page loads successfully, displaying a table or list of all registered users on the platform, showing details like username and registration date.

steps.step: Log out and log back in as a standard 'GM' user (non-admin).
Attempt to navigate directly to the '/admin/users' page.
steps.expected_result: Access is denied. The user is redirected to the main dashboard or shown a '403 Forbidden' error page. The list of users is not displayed.
